title: AI increasingly mentioned in children’s stories, research shows
description: Children are increasingly mentioning artificial intelligence (AI) in their stories, research has found.
content:
LONDON: Children are increasingly mentioning artificial intelligence (AI) in their stories, research has found.
Mentions of AI increased 50% from the year before in more than 46,500 stories children aged five to 11 submitted to a competition in 2025.... [2516 chars]

title: China Turns to AI as Jobseeker Numbers Top Belgium’s Population
description: China will harness artificial intelligence to create jobs as the number of university graduates poised to enter the labor market this year will reach 12.7 million — more than the population of countries such as Belgium.
content:

title: U.S. Tightens AI Contract Guidelines Amid Pentagon-Anthropic Conflict
description: The Trump administration has established stringent rules for civilian artificial intelligence contracts, demanding unrestricted legal use of models by the government. This comes during a dispute between the Pentagon and AI firm Anthropic, which was labeled a 'supply-chain risk' by the Department of Defense.
content: The Trump administration has introduced firm regulations for civilian AI contracts, requiring companies to allow any lawful use of their models, according to a Financial Times report. The move highlights ongoing tensions between the Pentagon and AI f... [681 chars]

title: 'Invisible Safety Shield': Snabbit Launches AI System To Protect Women Workers
description: Instant house-help services are scaling rapidly in urban India. Now Snabbit is turning to artificial intelligence to strengthen safety and trust for workers entering unfamiliar homes.
content: Snabbit has launched an artificial intelligence-based safety system to protect women workers providing short-duration household services through its platform. The feature, called Snabbit Kavach, monitors distress signals when workers enter customers'... [3017 chars]

title: China says it can keep jobs stable over next 5 years despite AI, labour challenges
description: China can keep employment ​stable and sustain positive ‌momentum over the next five years, ​its human resources ​minister said on Saturday, ⁠even as rising ​labour market uncertainties ​and the rapid development of artificial intelligence pose challenges.

title: China's Plan for Stable Employment Amid Labor Market Challenges
description: China plans to maintain stable employment and sustain positive momentum over the next five years despite facing challenges from labor market uncertainties and the rapid development of artificial intelligence. The government aims to expand job opportunities for young people, college graduates, and migrant workers.
content: China is aiming to sustain stable employment and positive economic momentum, according to its human resources minister. The statement came amid concerns over rising labor market uncertainties and the challenges posed by the rapid development of artif... [449 chars]

title: Questions over AI capability as tech guides Iran strikes
description: The latest bout of fighting between the United States, Israel and Iran has seen AI deployed as never before to sift intelligence and select targets, although the technology's use in war remains hotly debated.Different forms of artificial intelligence have reportedly been used to guide the Israeli campaign in Gaza and the capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro in an American raid.And experts believe the technology has helped select targets for the thousands of US and Israeli strikes on Iran since February 28 -- although exact uses have yet to be confirmed.
content:

title: Anthropic lists job roles which are most exposed to AI in US; See here
description: Computer programmers, customer service representatives, data entry keyers, medical record specialists, market research analysts and marketing specialists, among some others, are some of the job roles that are most at risk of being taken over by artificial intelligence, according to CBS News, which cited Anthropic, the maker of the AI chatbot Claude.

title: Public records in the age of artificial intelligence
description: Clerk's office inundated with requests while state task force searches for solutions
content:
